items.title: Digital Payment Update - ECommerce Payment Innovation Fuels Global Growth Potential
items.description: A recent study by Juniper Research projects that global eCommerce payments will surge to over $13 trillion by 2030 from $8.3 trillion in 2025, highlighting a significant growth opportunity driven predominantly by emerging markets such as Latin America and the Indian Subcontinent. This expansion is attributed to improving access to local payment methods in regions traditionally characterized by low card penetration. As access to eCommerce broadens, merchants and payment providers positioned to...

items.description: Visa could deliver 12% annual returns, benefit from dividend hikes, and tap into $23T in noncard payments. Click here to read my analysis of V stock.
